config.farmersdelight.client.comfortHung: Should the health bar have a silver sheen when the player has the Comfort effect?
config.farmersdelight.client.foodEffectT: Should meal and drink tooltips display which effects they provide?
config.farmersdelight.client.nourishment: Should the hunger bar have a gilded overlay when the player has the Nourishment effect?
config.farmersdelight.farming.defaultTom: Which rope should Tomato Vines leave behind when mined by hand?
config.farmersdelight.farming.enableToma: Enable Tomato Vine Climbing Tagged Ropes
Should tomato vines be able to climb any rope tagged as farmersdelight:ropes? Beware: this will convert these blocks into the block specified in defaultTomatoVineRope.
config.farmersdelight.overrides.dispense: Dispenser Uses Tools on Cutting Board
Should the Dispenser be able to operate a Cutting Board in front of it?
config.farmersdelight.overrides.rabbitSt: Should Rabbit Stew be buffed with improved food stats?
config.farmersdelight.overrides.vanillaS: Should soups and stews from vanilla Minecraft grant additional effects, like meals from this mod?

config.farmersdelight.settings.canvasSig: A list of dye colors that, when used as the background of a Canvas Sign, should default to white text when placed.
config.farmersdelight.settings.cuttingBo: How much of a bonus (in percentage) should each level of Fortune grant to Cutting Board chances? Set it to 0.0 to disable this.
config.farmersdelight.settings.enableRop: Should players be able to reel back rope, bottom to top, when sneak-using with an empty hand on them?
config.farmersdelight.settings.enableVan: Farmer's Delight adds crates (3x3) for vanilla crops, similar to Quark and Thermal Cultivation. Should they be craftable?
config.farmersdelight.settings.farmersBu: Should Novice and Apprentice Farmers buy this mod's crops? (May reduce chances of other trades appearing)
config.farmersdelight.settings.richSoilB: How often (in percentage) should Rich Soil succeed in boosting a plant's growth at each random tick? Set it to 0.0 to disable this.
config.farmersdelight.settings.wandering: Should the Wandering Trader sell some of this mod's items? (Currently includes crop seeds and onions)
config.farmersdelight.stack_size.enableS: Should BowlFoodItems in the following list become stackable to 16, much like Farmer's Delight's meals?
config.farmersdelight.stack_size.soupIte: List of BowlFoodItems. They must extend this class to be affected. Default: vanilla soups and stews.
config.farmersdelight.wild_beetroots.cha: Chance of generating clusters. Smaller value = more frequent.

farmersdelight.configuration.canvasSignD:
A list of dye colors that, when used as the background color of a Canvas Sign, should default to white text when placed.

Dyes:
["white", "orange", "magenta", "light_blue", "yellow", "lime", "pink", "gray", "light_gray", "cyan", "purple", "blue", "brown", "green", "red", "black"]
farmersdelight.configuration.cuttingBoar: How much (in decimal percentage) should each level of Fortune increase the odds of obtaining rare results on the Cutting Board? Set to 0.0 to disable.
farmersdelight.configuration.debug.toolt: §lWarning:§r This section is not meant for standard gameplay.
farmersdelight.configuration.defaultToma: Which rope should Tomato Vines leave behind when broken?
farmersdelight.configuration.enableComfo: If enabled, a scrolling overlay will be shown over the health meter when the player has the Comfort effect.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableCooki: If enabled, the Cooking Pot will provide a Recipe Book on its interface, similar to the one on Crafting Tables and Furnaces.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableCutti: If enabled, the Dispenser will be able to operate a Cutting Board in front of itself, using stored items as cutting tools.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableFarme: If enabled, Novice and Apprentice Farmer villagers will have a chance to buy crops from this mod.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableFoodE: If enabled, food items will display tooltips showing which effects they grant when eaten, if any. Applies to foods from both Minecraft and this mod.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableNouri: If enabled, a gilded overlay will be shown over the food meter when the player has the Nourishment effect.
farmersdelight.configuration.enablePumpk: If enabled, Pumpkin Pie will require the user to sneak to place it down as a block.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableRabbi: If enabled, Rabbit Stew will be given improved food stats, to match its crafting cost.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableRopeR: If enabled, players will be able to reel back rope, bottom to top, when sneak-using with an empty hand on them.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableStack: If enabled, any BowlFoodItem in the following list will become stackable to 16, much like Farmer's Delight's meals.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableTomat:
Tomato crops hanging on rope will force-place a Rope block when broken. Due to technical limitations, this affects things such as commands, making them fail to 'setblock' this block on the first attempt.

Disable this if this block is preventing you from editing a region in creative or with commands. For normal gameplay, I recommend leaving this enabled.

If enabled, tomato crops will be able to climb any rope tagged as farmersdelight:ropes. If disabled, this will be restricted to this mod's rope only.

§lBeware: this will convert these blocks into the block specified in defaultTomatoVineRope.§r
farmersdelight.configuration.enableVanil: If enabled, storage crates (3x3) for vanilla crops (similar to Quark and Thermal Cultivation) will become craftable.
If enabled, soups and stews from Minecraft will grant Nourishment when eaten, similar to meals from this mod.
farmersdelight.configuration.enableWande: If enabled, the Wandering Trader will have a chance to sell seeds and plantables from this mod.
farmersdelight.configuration.generateFDC: If enabled, new loot pools will be added to chest loot across the game, containing items from this mod (ropes, crops, tools etc).
Generate Mod Crops on Village Farms
If enabled, crops from Farmer's Delight will sometimes replace standard crops in village farm plots.
farmersdelight.configuration.generateVil: If enabled, Compost Heaps (structures containing Organic Compost piles) will sometimes generate across Villages.
farmersdelight.configuration.richSoilBoo: The chance (in decimal percentage) of Rich Soil providing a bone meal boost to a crop planted on it. Set to 0.0 to disable.
farmersdelight.configuration.soupItemLis: List of targeted food items. They must extend the BowlFoodItem class in code to be affected. Defaults to vanilla soups and stews.
farmersdelight.configuration.title: Farmer's Delight — Settings
farmersdelight.item.skillet.how_to_cook: Use your other hand to hold ingredients!
farmersdelight.jei.decomposition.acceler: Sped up by adjacent activators (see below)
farmersdelight.jei.info.dough: Wheat can be turned into Dough by crafting it with a Water Bucket. But don't worry, the bucket's water won't be depleted!
farmersdelight.jei.info.ham:
A large cut of meat from a Pig or Hoglin's leg.

You will need something lighter than a Sword to cut one...
farmersdelight.jei.info.knife:
A lightweight melee weapon, with fast swings and gentle damage.

They can harvest Straw from grasses, and guarantee secondary drops from animals.
farmersdelight.jei.info.straw: A dry plant fiber used in crafting. Obtained by cutting grassy crops and plants with a Knife.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_beetroots: Beetroot can be commonly found as a wild plant in beach coasts.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_cabbages: Cabbages can be commonly found as a wild plant in beach coasts.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_carrots: Carrots can be commonly found as a wild plant in temperate lands, such as plains and forests.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_onions: Onions can be commonly found as a wild plant in temperate lands, such as plains and forests.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_potatoes: Potatoes can be commonly found as a wild plant in cold lands, such as mountains and taigas.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_rice: Rice can be commonly found as a wild plant in the ponds of wet lands, such as swamps and jungles.
farmersdelight.jei.info.wild_tomatoes: Tomatoes can be commonly found as a wild plant in arid lands, such as savannas and deserts.
farmersdelight.rei.decomposition.acceler: Sped up by adjacent activators (see below)

farmersdelight.rei.info.knife: Knives are lightweight melee weapons. They can harvest Straw from grasses, and guarantee secondary drops from animals.
farmersdelight.rei.info.straw: A dry plant fiber used in crafting. Obtained by cutting grassy crops and plants with a Knife.
